# README assets

Drop screenshots and the demo video poster here, using these exact filenames so
the main README picks them up automatically:

| Filename | Screen | What to show |
|---|---|---|
| `screenshot-discover.png` | Discover | The scored job list with "Sponsor confirmed" badges, filters, and pagination. This is the hero shot |
| `screenshot-pipeline.png` | Pipeline | The board (Saved, Applied, Interview, Offer) and the approval queue |
| `screenshot-settings.png` | Settings | User settings and preferences |
| `screenshot-mailbox.png` | Mailbox | Inbox with a thread open (avoid showing real personal email content) |
| `screenshot-chat.png` | Tess (agent) | The conversational assistant, ideally with an action awaiting approval |
| `screenshot-analytics.png` | Analytics | Salary bands and the application funnel (optional) |
| `video-poster.png` | n/a | A poster frame for the demo video |

**Recommended:** 1600px wide or larger, PNG. Avoid showing real personal data
such as your actual email address, real recruiter messages, or private contact
details.
